_comment: Programs landing page copy and pathway cards. Card order matches the public program grid.

hero.title: Who's to Say What's Possible?
hero.subtitle: Interest-driven programs designed to build confidence, skills, and community one pathway at a time.

gridHeading.title: The Possibility Paths
gridHeading.subtitle: Participants can explore one or multiple pathways depending on their interests, strengths, and goals.

programs.label: Independence Path
programs.title: Life Skills & Independent Living

programs.label: Community Path
programs.title: Community Integration & Advocacy

programs.label: Art Path

programs.label: Entertainment Path

howPathways.title: How Pathways Work
howPathways.subtitle: Flexible paths for building confidence and independence.

steps.title: Choose
steps.body: Start with what excites you — interests lead the way.

steps.title: Build

steps.title: Expand
steps.body: Paths can overlap and evolve toward an integrated project.
